title: 10 x RED TARTAN PULL BOWS (15cm diameter) - Christmas Scottish Gift Basket Hamper Party Ribbon Bow
features: Pack of 10 quality pull bows with a vibrant red tartan design
Each bow is individually wrapped and packed flat
Easy to use - simply pull the two inner pieces of curling ribbon to form the bow!
Made with 50mm with ribbon and measures approx. 18cm diameter when formed
Perfect for gift hampers and baskets at Christmas and all year round
description: Pack of 10 pull bows with a fabulous patriotic red tartan design and are available in packs of 5. There come packed flat and are individually wrapped. All you need to do is pull the two inner pieces of curling ribbon through the middle of the two outer ribbons and hey presto, you have a wonderful Pull Bow! Made from 50mm width ribbon - final bow measurements are approximately18cm diameter and consist of 18 loops They are to perfect to use on your Gift Basket Hampers at Christmas and throughout the year to help show off your Jams, Chutneys, Shortbread Biscuits, Pickles and liquor. Ideal for Shop Display and decorations for all celebrations.
